text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One busy day of training leading up to the Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: UNACCEPTABLE!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uhh, what is?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen of course! How can they treat
me as if I'm some commoner?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I also declared I'm running! So why are you the talk of the town!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha... To be honest though, I'm not
enjoying any of this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leaving a good impression on the audience
at the Kikuka Sho, Seiun Sky has become the
racer to watch out for in the upcoming Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
"What does she have up her sleeve for the Arima
Kinen? Expectations are soaring for Seiun Sky's
tricks!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The news, social media—you're all anyone's
talking about!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I haven't found even the slightest mention of
myself! How humiliating!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There, there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess this means I changed everyone's opinion of
me too much. Not that that doesn't have its
benefits...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If everyone thinks me a capable runner now, how
do I turn that idea on its head? It's time to show
'em what I really got. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you go quiet all of a sudden? It's scary. All
out of comebacks or something?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...How are you able to take this so lightly?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't you feel the enormous pressure to perform
well?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind. Forget what I just said.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure... but I think it's because I can
be practical about it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Practical?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to live up to anyone's expectations.
I'm going to win just because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I made it this far by doing what I have to, and the
crowd just happened to find it entertaining.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a racer with incredible skills or anything.
All I can do is run my own way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
To make it sound cooler... at your final wrong
turn, you'll have found the right path.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The right path...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, yeah... It's not that I'm taking this lightly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I think I understand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yes?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: At the Arima Kinen! I, and no one else...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Will catapult you out of the spotlight! SO BE
PREPARED!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, she made me jump. Why is she always so
loud?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Probably. I bet she's just been overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: She'll pull herself together. She's strong like that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I kinda understand how she feels though, having
to push herself back on her feet alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, we coincidentally run into another of
Sky's peers...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sei.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heya, Grass. On your way to training?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes! There are a few final things I must prepare
for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder glances down at her legs. She
spent the first half of her classic year mostly
recovering from an injury.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess you've got nothing to worry about
anymore. I'll be facing you in all your splendor in
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, of course, I'll be there at my best. I take it
you're in good condition as well?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In a way, I suppose. Can't seem to go anywhere
without seeing the next person's think piece
about me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is that so? That doesn't sound so bad to me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No way! Some people are saying I can't compare
now that you're at full strength.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Even if that's the case, I'll still have to use every
ounce of my soul to make sure I don't lose.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Because I must win this year's Arima Kinen. There
is no other option.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I have to get going now. Take care.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...I might be in trouble.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Grass... I think she's managed to surpass
perfection.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Looks like meeting everyone's expectations won't
come easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first preparations for the Arima Kinen
conclude with a disquieting glimpse of what's to
come...
